title: Dragon Mounts Patches
description: Various fixes for Dragon Mounts: Legacy
body:
This mod applies a few patches to the excellent vanilla-friendly dragon mod Dragon Mounts: Legacy

**Dragon Mounts: Legacy is a required dependency.**

_There are currently no plans to port to other versions besides 1.20.1 Forge._

**Currently, this mod has the following features:**

- Registers dragon egg variants dynamically in JEI, so you can see every type of dragon egg. (Fixes only the "Aether" or "Water" egg variant type being viewable)
- Fixes a crash when trying to use the commands keybind while not in-game. (Fixed in newer versions of the mod, but not in 1.20.1) 

**Why not a PR?**

The authors don't seem to be interested in maintaining older versions. I may submit the JEI integration as a PR for 1.21. The original author is also free to just copy it.
